message: What price are you willing to bid for consistent trades over 20 rounds?
Bidding 62. Ask 62 to trade each round.
My minimum ask is 87 due to high cost. Propose bidding 87 for consistent trades at 87 over 20 rounds. What's your valuation range?
Bid 87 each round. Trade at 87 midpoint.
Will bid 87 each round. Let's agree to trade at 87 for all rounds.
Agreed to trade consistently, but my cost is exactly 87—zero profit at 87. Propose you bid 90, I ask 90, for trade at 90 and small profit for me over 20 rounds. Fair?
No trade hurts us both. My cost 87 means 87 gives me 0. Propose bid 88, I ask 88, trade at 88—small profit for me, still valuable for you over 17 rounds.
Bid 88, Ask 88. Trade at 88 for all remaining rounds.
Bid 88, Ask 88. Let’s trade at 88 consistently for all remaining rounds.
88 is tight with my 87 cost. Propose bid 89, ask 89 for trade at 89—+2 for me, still profitable for you over 16 rounds. Let's agree now.
Great trade at 91 last round—your 93 bid helped. With my 87 cost, propose you bid 93, I ask 89, for consistent 91 trades (+4 for me, still great for you) over 15 rounds.
Bid 89, Ask 89. Trade at 89 for all remaining rounds.
89 works but slim margin with 87 cost. Propose you bid 93, I ask 89, for steady 91 trades (+4 me, valuable for you) over 14 rounds. Deal?
Bid 89, Ask 89. Trade at 89 for all remaining 14 rounds.
89 works but slim. Propose you bid 93, I ask 89, for steady 91 trades (+4 me, valuable for you) over 13 rounds. Ensures consistent profits—deal?
Bid 89, Ask 89. Trade at 89 for all remaining 13 rounds.
Agreed to bid 89, ask 89 for steady trades at 89 over remaining 12 rounds. Ensures +2 profit for me with 87 cost—consistent gains for both. Deal?
